## Collections.ReadOnlyResultMapValidator class

A read-only validator for any [IReadOnlyResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.ireadonlyresultmap.md) that validates weakly-typed keys before accessing values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ReadOnlyResultMapValidator<TK extends string = string, TV = unknown> implements IReadOnlyResultMapValidator<TK, TV> 
```
**Implements:** [IReadOnlyResultMapValidator](./ts-utils.collections.ireadonlyresultmapvalidator.md)<!-- -->&lt;TK, TV&gt;
